extension.description: GLua/Lua editor extension for go-lua-vm: syntax highlighting, diagnostics, completion, require navigation, hover docs, formatting, custom function docs, and GLua DAP Debug/Attach.
glua.openBuiltinSignatureJson.title: GLua: Open builtin signature JSON
glua.showBuiltinDocStatus.title: GLua: Show builtin doc status
glua.showOutput.title: GLua: Show language server output
glua.createAttachConfig.title: GLua: Create DAP attach configuration
glua.startAttachDebug.title: GLua: Attach to DAP server
glua.runCurrentFile.title: GLua: Run current file
glua.debugCurrentFile.title: GLua: Debug current file
glua.selectGluaExecutable.title: GLua: Select glua executable
glua.selectGluacExecutable.title: GLua: Select gluac executable
glua.selectBuiltinDocs.title: GLua: Select builtin docs JSON
glua.debug.request.attach.description: Attach to an existing GLua DAP server.
glua.debug.request.launch.description: Launch GLua script debugging. The extension manages the DAP connection address internally.
glua.debug.name.description: Configuration name shown in the debug dropdown.
glua.debug.host.description: Remote GLua DAP host. Used when attaching to a server started outside VS Code.
glua.debug.port.description: Remote GLua DAP port. Used when attaching to a server started outside VS Code.
glua.debug.gluaExecutable.description: Path to glua executable. Defaults to glua.executable.
glua.debug.useRemoteDap.description: Use host/port attach mode even when a glua executable is configured.
glua.debug.args.description: Arguments passed to glua by launch helpers.
glua.debug.host.fallback.description: Fallback remote GLua DAP host when gluaExecutable is empty.
glua.debug.port.fallback.description: Fallback remote GLua DAP port when gluaExecutable is empty.
glua.configuration.syntax.description: Syntax mode passed to gluals: extended, all, lua53, none/off/default, or comma-separated extensions such as continue,switch,const.
glua.configuration.events.description: Enable GLua event API symbols in the language server.
glua.configuration.docLanguage.descripti: Language tag used for builtin docs, hover text and signatures.
glua.configuration.executable.descriptio: Path to the glua executable used by debug launch helpers. Use the command 'GLua: Select glua executable' to choose a file.
glua.configuration.languageServerExecuta: Path to gluals. Required when the extension does not bundle your operating system and architecture.
glua.configuration.gluacExecutable.descr: Path to the gluac executable used by compile helpers. Use the command 'GLua: Select gluac executable' to choose a file.
glua.configuration.dapHost.description: Remote GLua DAP host used by attach debugging and by Debug current file when glua.useRemoteDap is enabled.
glua.configuration.dapPort.description: Remote GLua DAP port used by attach debugging and by Debug current file when glua.useRemoteDap is enabled.
glua.configuration.useRemoteDap.descript: Use glua.dapHost and glua.dapPort for Debug current file instead of launching the configured glua executable.
glua.configuration.builtinDocs.descripti: Absolute or workspace-relative JSON files to extend or override builtin function docs. Use the command 'GLua: Select builtin docs JSON' to choose files.
